title: TNFR Spectral Factorization: Paley Gap Coherence Toolkit
description: Spectral TNFR factorization package that lifts Paley graph Laplacian spectra into canonical TNFR telemetry (Φ_s, |∇φ|, K_φ, ξ_C) to expose factor structure. Includes SpectralPaleyFactorizer, CLI entry point, reproducible notebooks, and benchmark scripts that store coherence evidence alongside ΔNFR arithmetic telemetry.
notes: Prototype release prepared for Zenodo; update DOI and description before publication.
